title: alyssum cephalotes
intro: Alyssum cephalotes, also known as sweet alyssum or madwort, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alyssum cephalotes include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Alyssum cephalotes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic use.
